prompt: A technical director at a production village table backstage, covered in two open laptops, a small monitor showing camera feeds, a notepad and pen, and a coffee. Viewed from above-right at a three-quarter angle. The screens glow softly cool, a single amber clip-lamp arches over the table casting warm light on the hands and paperwork. Subject's hand reaches for the laptop trackpad. Deep shadow behind. Cinematic photographic realism. — cinematic volumetric stage lighting, deep black background (#0A0A0F), gold gradient accent (#E8C078 -> #D4A24A -> #9C7126), high-contrast subject, no text in image, no emojis, no logos
